notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Byron Buxton. Gunnar Henderson scores. Pete Alonso to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Beavers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Beavers grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Tristan Gray to first baseman Kody Clemens. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Dylan Beavers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Beavers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Beavers grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Tristan Gray to first baseman Kody Clemens. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Dylan Beavers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Luke Keaschall to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell plunked
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell hit by pitch. Matt Wallner to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Kody Clemens steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: James Outman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: James Outman walks. Josh Bell to 3rd. Victor Caratini to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Luke Keaschall to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: James Outman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: James Outman flies out to left fielder Taylor Ward.
